display.purpose: Hero name only. One instance per page.

headline.purpose: Section headings (h2). Never used for subsections.

title.purpose: Card titles, project names, experience roles (h3).

label.purpose: Tech tags, wordmark, metadata only. JetBrains Mono.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for color/opacity state transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. Warm Grain fill, Espresso text. Used for 'View work', 'Send message'.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">View Work <svg class="ds-btn-icon" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14"/><path d="m12 5 7 7-7 7"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background-color: #cbad8d; color: #3a2d28; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.9375rem; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.85; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #a48374; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-icon { flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary CTA. Transparent background, Stone Edge border. Used for 'Résumé', secondary nav actions.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost"><svg class="ds-btn-icon" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="7 10 12 15 17 10"/><line x1="12" x2="12" y1="15" y2="3"/></svg> Résumé</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background-color: transparent; color: #3a2d28; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.9375rem; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid #d1c7bd; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 150ms; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background-color: #ebe3db; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #a48374; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-icon { flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Tech Tag
components.description: Technology label chip. Non-interactive. JetBrains Mono, rounded-full. Used in project cards and skills.
components.css: .ds-tech-tag { display: inline-block; background-color: #ebe3db; color: #6e5a50; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid #d1c7bd; letter-spacing: 0.02em; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form field. Parchment bg, Stone Edge border. Focus shifts border to Leather — crisp, no glow.
components.css: .ds-input-wrapper { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-input-label { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #3a2d28; } .ds-input { width: 100%; background-color: #f1ede6; color: #3a2d28; font-size: 1rem; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid #d1c7bd; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6e5a5070; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #a48374; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; }

components.name: Project Card
components.description: Project showcase card. Tonal surface, full border, hover lift. Featured cards span 2 columns.
components.html:
Project Name

A short description of what this project does and why it matters.

TypeScriptReactAzure
components.css: .ds-card { background-color: rgba(235, 227, 219, 0.5); border: 1px solid #d1c7bd; border-radius: 0.75rem; padding: 24px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0; transition: transform 300ms cubic-bezier(0.0, 0.0, 0.2, 1); cursor: default; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); } .ds-card-header { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #3a2d28; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-card-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; color: #6e5a50; } .ds-card-link { color: #6e5a50; transition: color 150ms; text-decoration: none; } .ds-card-link:hover { color: #3a2d28; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 1rem; color: #6e5a50; line-height: 1.625; flex: 1; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-card-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; } .ds-tech-tag { display: inline-block; background-color: #ebe3db; color: #6e5a50; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid #d1c7bd; letter-spacing: 0.02em; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: Sticky header. Backdrop blur, wordmark with Leather period, ghost résumé CTA, theme toggle.
components.html:
steven.
  • About
  • Projects
  • Contact
Résumé
components.css: .ds-nav { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 40; background-color: rgba(241, 237, 230, 0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(209, 199, 189, 0.6); } .ds-nav-inner { max-width: 64rem; margin: 0 auto; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 64px; padding: 0 24px; } .ds-wordmark { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #3a2d28; text-decoration: none; } .ds-wordmark-dot { color: #a48374; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 28px; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-nav-link { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #6e5a50; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms; } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link--active { color: #3a2d28; font-weight: 500; } .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background-color: transparent; color: #3a2d28; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid #d1c7bd; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 150ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background-color: #ebe3db; } .ds-nav-resume { }

narrative.overview:
This is the portfolio of someone who notices things. Not the engineer who shows up with a slide deck — the one who arrives with a notebook full of observations, sketches an architecture on the back of an envelope, and ships the thing before the deck is finished. The visual system embodies that: warm, precise, and quietly confident. Every design decision earns its presence the way a field note earns its margin.

The system is light-first with a warm hand-laid palette — parchment backgrounds, stone borders, a Warm Grain accent that reads like late-afternoon light on a wooden desk. Dark mode inverts to the same chromatic warmth, deeper and quieter. Typography is tight and intentional: semibold headings with slightly negative tracking, generous body leading, monospace labels used sparingly to signal precision without performing 'developer.'

The site should feel like the work: confident enough not to explain itself, specific enough to be trusted, and warm enough that a hiring manager actually reads it.
keyCharacteristics: Warm tonal palette, flat by default, depth through surface layering not shadow
Typography-led hierarchy with negative-tracked headings and generous body line-height
Monospace labels reserved for metadata and technical tags — never for body prose
Motion: purposeful, not decorative; Apple-paced transitions
Photography section treated as character, not decoration

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Warm Grain (#cbad8d) is used on ≤10% of any given viewport. It marks decisions — buttons, active nav, focus states. It never fills backgrounds, headings, or long runs of text.

rules.name: The No-Pop Rule
rules.body: No color outside the Warm Grain family. No blues for links, no red for errors. Error states use Espresso-weight text. The palette is closed.

rules.name: The Mono-Restraint Rule
rules.body: Monospace type signals precision; it should appear where precision is the message. Tech tags, the wordmark, and metadata labels: yes. Section intros, card descriptions, nav labels: no.

rules.name: The No-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: Section headings do not carry numbered eyebrow labels ('01 — Skills', '02 — Projects'). This pattern is AI scaffolding, not brand voice. The eyebrow prop is used only for genuinely non-sequential context labels, never numbering.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. backdrop-filter is permitted on sticky nav. No box-shadow elsewhere. If you feel the urge to add a shadow to a card, add a border instead.

dos: Do use Warm Grain (#cbad8d) for primary interactive elements and focus states only. Its rarity is its power.
Do use Leather (#a48374) for hover states, secondary accents, and role-label text.
Do use Muted Earth (#6e5a50) for secondary body copy — it is AA-compliant on Parchment.
Do cap body line length at 65ch.
Do use text-wrap: balance on h1 and h2 elements.
Do use JetBrains Mono only for metadata, tech tags, and the wordmark.
Do treat the photography section as character, not filler.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: all animations must have instant or crossfade fallbacks.
Do write alt text with voice: 'Fog clearing over Mount Rainier at dawn' beats 'mountain photo'.
donts: Don't use numbered section eyebrows ('01 — Skills'). This is AI scaffolding.
Don't swap Hanken Grotesk for Inter, Geist, or a system-default sans — the single-family Hanken hierarchy is the committed identity.
Don't add box-shadow to cards. The palette creates depth through tonal layering.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe on any element.
Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient. Gradient text is an absolute ban.
Don't use colors outside the Warm Grain palette family.
Don't make the site feel like a corporate LinkedIn résumé.
Don't make the site feel brutalist or maximalist.
Don't add cursor effects, scroll-jacking, or parallax.
Don't use progress bars or percentage displays for skill levels.
